name: Viswam Report Card Automation (V4.1 - Direct PDF Fix)

parameters.subject: =PSA Assessment Report – {{ $('Consolidate Data').first().json.schoolName }}
parameters.message:
=Dear Sir/Madam,

Thank you for your support in conducting the PSA assessment for Grade 7 students. We are pleased to share your school's PSA assessment report, which highlights students' current learning levels and readiness for competency-based assessments.

This initiative is sponsored by Federation for Democratic Reforms (FDR), with implementation support from Viswam Edutech, and assessment partnership with North South Foundation.

We hope the report will support your academic review and planning.

With Regards,
Federation for Democratic Reforms
